results.justification: EXACT TWIN — cascade priority small-to-large + multi-tier escalation IS the K-tier gravity-cascade + per-tier capacity throttle mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — optimal cascade routing + per-tier confidence thresholds IS the per-token directional valve + dry-wet regime mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — cost-constrained per-tier accept/escalate IS the per-tier capacity throttle T_k mechanism.
Cascade + verification escalation overlaps with retention-vs-runoff + per-token valve mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — non-uniform layer sampling + per-layer importance IS the altitude-gradient layer temperature τ_l mechanism.
KV cache layer + capacity-constrained storage overlaps with top-tier cistern capacity-constrained reservoir mechanism.
Temperature + per-layer sampling overlaps with altitude-gradient layer-temperature mechanism.
Latency-aware per-layer optimization overlaps with K-tier capacity throttle mechanism.
